name: 12E017 Experimental oTree
description: Heroku: subdir buildpack before Python; PROJECT_PATH must be a real config var on the app (Dashboard → Config vars, or scripts/heroku-configure-subdir.sh). app.json env is not auto-applied to existing GitHub-linked apps.

PROJECT_PATH.description: Required for timanovsky subdir buildpack: relative path from repo root to the oTree app. Must be set as a Heroku config var or the build fails with PROJECT_PATH is undefined.
